mapper.select:
SELECT pt.id, pt.clinic_id AS clinicId, c.clinic_name AS clinicName, pt.template_code AS templateCode, pt.template_name AS templateName, pt.template_type AS templateType, pt.content, pt.is_default AS isDefault, pt.status, pt.remark FROM print_template pt LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.id = pt.clinic_id WHERE pt.org_id = #{orgId} AND pt.status = 1
AND (pt.clinic_id IS NULL OR pt.clinic_id IN
#{clinicId} )
AND pt.clinic_id IS NULL
AND (pt.clinic_id IS NULL OR pt.clinic_id IN
#{clinicId} )
AND pt.clinic_id IS NULL
AND (pt.clinic_id IS NULL OR pt.clinic_id = #{query.clinicId})
AND pt.template_type = #{query.templateType}
AND ( pt.template_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR pt.template_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY pt.is_default DESC, pt.id ASC
